title: PizzaPartyProps
description: Random Props from the PizzaParty Youtube Channel on Youtube that each of us wanted in the mod.
body:
### This mod is a collection of props that the people at pizzaparty asked for.

![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b4cad737e79fb48f4ee0ae6c2ea107bfc226125.png)

**Creator Heads!**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
The Bulb Head and the DesignestNicest Head
  
![An image of the rock head and bulb head including their function](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70c9ed144b9e9f1d295dbadd8898b3a918eebc08.png)

the pet rock says eh? when clicked and the bulb head can be powered on and off using a lever.
</details>

**Forms of Art!**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
rick astley Music DISC

![Rick astley never gonna give you up being played on a music disc!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7571799c808accfecc70f066d148421dea9a7a9.png)

PizzaPartyPlace Painting

![all four of our personalities and skins captured into one painting!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d9f987af6f6b5f251d0780eff91ac7fcf918717.png)
</details>

**foods!**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Pizza.. just pizza.

![pizza that refills your hunger bar entirely with a small side effect.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3be8cf42b58e9cce18881622776a284f94ddb8a0.png)

CANDY!

![Gives you a sugar rush effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d89eaccae21280bcfc635e30607f23f76143340.png)

gives you sugar rush that makes you fast and jump high!

Retro Mushroom
![Makes ya big and Makes ya strong for 5 minutes!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1493a8949545a724f91f21cbf4c0f4a38e5f02cf.png)

Makes you big and strong like mario for 5 minutes!

Baked Beans
![Makes ya fart, other than that.. useless...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fae9fb8b6e1f8a6090b1d348afa2cd675826b58.png)

Cooked flesh!
![restores more hunger than steak!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/649cace81318591a972f0b861e0638643f523c13.png)
</details>

**Blocks!**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Retro blocks

![Retro blocks can be crafted using gold and items dropped from previous retro blocks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23d5b428f7d493a6f08dfd9cd44dde64afeed168_0.webp)

the retro mystery block drops a mushroom!

The dust bench!
![allows trading with villagers for redstone!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0ea8f7e54d6e7772665b868d33de65a49c2e631_0.webp)

you can now trade with villagers to obtain most redstone items!

Tempered glass!
![Unbreakable from explosions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3100c6ec613c09e95a27728f9c9e18ddcd7b2604.png)

can't be broken by explosions

Subscribe block!
![forces you to subscribe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50cbddeb5a734adbde21a085702a8ebda1ca7099.png)
</details>


**Entities!**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Subby!![Launches candy!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7581bd3a0662860d882536f13ef2e45d5fcaa12c.png)

  ![begs you to subscribe loudly!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/548dfadf30bc9a7503bc53c681f69d81e88f7b48.png)

begs you to subscribe LOUDLY!

Frostbitten!

![drops frozen flesh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/498e7bf473730157ecf44f8e9c0b3614ac86603e.png)

drops frozen flesh wich can be cooked into flesh wich can be cooked into cooked flesh! also only spawns in cold biomes!

Scorching!

![Drops shards of glass!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3613de8664be99b2ca7d1a251cdd0c0a6b62851b.png)

being so incredibly hot it turns the sand on it's head into shards of glass wich can be turned into tempered glass! also only spawns in hot biomes!

The Giople!

![Made by ME!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/561bfa0d76493985753a6263f88ad3f006e7ef94.png)

This one just screams and pogs! also drops baked beans and spawns in swampy biomes since it's a frog.

Willow..

![Who made me do this?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72f1666599bd327a680a4de9a69fd813ecc26e05.png)

she can be tamed using slime balls and is only found through crafting. I am not the one who wanted to make this..

</details>

**Items!**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Hatsune Miku...

![WhY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70cc851550afc1847cebccefb61184bbacaa3a7a.png)

Can be used to break any block quickly and can be used to break and obtain bedrock in return for XP!

Rick Astley Music Disc!

![Never gonna give you up!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72023e77dedd03dd6a727d80fd49b5235f37c418.png)

can be crafted

Sub Button!

![Sub Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ab07d118588eaff649798abfa1197ed7c2ca0a5.png)

Can be crafted and used to enter the sub dimension where subby and the sub block can be found, you can't however exit the sub dimension as the subbies there will kill you..

Skipping foods!!

Frozen meat and it's stages!!

![Frozen meat that ya can't eat!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83822eb51fcc00f4bf2c1ba81a76a95cb4585980.png)

the frozen meat is dropped from the frostbite mob!

Glass Shard!

![Can be dropped from the Scorching!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/408e9e1b0b343d7cba1a6d04d823d6e5e6b24dfb.png)

gets dropped from the scorching! and can be used to turn into tempered glass!

Retro coin and Retro Mushroom!

![dropped from the block behind!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dcf276f621f77e623289ce851407004caca5533.png)

each item gets dropped from the block behind it!

Empty can of baked beans!

![can be turned into nuggets!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ea1358658334866c73c0de01cf0fbae257000e3.png)

after eating can of baked beans you get the empty can of baked beans! you can then smelt the empty can of baked beans to get an iron nugget!

Candy Gun!

![Launches candy!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7581bd3a0662860d882536f13ef2e45d5fcaa12c.png)

The candy gun launches candy not doing much damage but afflicting enemies that got hit with a version of sugar rush! that after entities jump they get launched 1000 blocks up into the air!
not recommended for flat area's..

</details>
